request: You are Reviewer R9: install/release/new-PC parity reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect <machine-local-path> docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\INSTALL.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, install.ps1, installer scripts found by rg 'installer|release|managed hook|new-PC|launcher|uninstall|purge', package.json, and relevant data state. Judge whether completion conditions are enough for a new computer install to recover app/data version parity, Codex/Claude MCP+hooks, Observatory launchers, verifier launchers, uninstall/purge safety, and GitHub release/data sync equivalence. Return reviewer_id=R9, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
